title: Inaccurate Duplicate Handling in Binary Search

statement.markdown: Your task is to fix the implementation of a binary search function that handles duplicate elements in the input array. The function should return true if the target number is found, and false otherwise. Note that the array contains duplicate elements, and you should not consider duplicates as a special case but rather handle them as part of the search process.
statement.inputFormat: The input will be an array of integers and a target number, where the array size will be between 1 and 10,000.
statement.outputFormat: The binary search function should return a boolean indicating whether the target number is found in the array.
statement.notes: The array is sorted in ascending order, and there are no negative numbers.

examples.explanation: The target number 3 is present in the array with duplicate elements.
The target number 7 is not present in the array.

hints.text: Review the handling of duplicate elements in binary search.
Consider the case where the middle element is a duplicate.

editorial.title: Editorial for Inaccurate Duplicate Handling in Binary Search
editorial.intuition: The key insight is to treat duplicate elements as equal values and perform the binary search accordingly.
editorial.bruteForce: Brute force approach summary: Try each element in the array to determine if it is equal to the target number.
editorial.betterSolution: The binary search algorithm can be adapted to handle duplicate elements efficiently.
editorial.optimalSolution: The optimal solution involves modifying the binary search algorithm to treat duplicate elements as equal values.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The correctness of the modified binary search algorithm can be proven using mathematical induction.
editorial.dryRun: Step-by-step example run: Use a dry run to validate the modified binary search algorithm.

functionSignature.java: public boolean search(int[] nums, int target);
functionSignature.python: def search(self, nums: list[int], target: int) -> bool;
